name: Approved Cash
description_short: Approved Cash offers payday loans, title loans, check cashing, and installment loans with same-day approval from locations in Oklahoma City and other states.
description_long:
Approved Cash is a financial services company headquartered in Oklahoma City, OK, operating under the slogan "Always Easy, Always Approved." The company positions itself as a lender willing to approve customers who may be rejected by traditional lenders, emphasizing speed and accessibility in the loan application process.

Approved Cash primarily offers payday loans and title loans as their core products. For payday loans, applicants need only provide a driver's license, checking account statement, recent paycheck stub, and personal check. For title loans, they require a driver's license, clear car title, and the vehicle itself. The company also provides check cashing services and installment loans, with service availability varying by state and location. Customers can apply online, in-person at a physical location, or by calling 888-227-4758 for pre-qualification.

The company differentiates itself through convenience (multiple locations, online application options) and a customer-first approach, claiming to approve applicants quickly when other lenders decline them. Their extended Saturday hours (9:30 AM–1:00 PM) and weekday availability (10 AM–6 PM) provide accessibility for working individuals.

However, Approved Cash operates in the high-cost lending space. Payday and title loans typically carry annual percentage rates (APRs) significantly exceeding 100%, which can create debt cycles for vulnerable borrowers. The website provides no transparent disclosure of interest rates, fees, or repayment terms—critical information for assessing affordability. While suitable for genuine short-term emergencies, these products are not sustainable debt solutions and can trap borrowers in repeated borrowing.
pros: Multiple application channels: online, in-person locations, and phone pre-qualification (888-227-4758)
Fast approval and same-day funding emphasized as core value proposition
Extended Saturday hours (9:30 AM–1:00 PM) plus weekday availability until 6 PM
Simple application requirements for payday loans (no credit check implied by approval language)
Title loan option provides collateral-based lending for vehicle owners
Additional services including check cashing and installment loans
Multiple locations across multiple states (not limited to Oklahoma)
cons: No interest rates, APR, or fee information disclosed on website—critical for comparing affordability
Payday and title loans typically carry APRs exceeding 100%, creating high debt costs
Short repayment terms (typically 2 weeks) designed for repeat borrowing, not one-time solutions
Limited transparency about loan terms, eligibility criteria, or state-specific regulations
High risk of debt cycles: "We say 'Yes' when other guys say 'No'" suggests approval regardless of repayment capacity
best_for: Individuals with immediate short-term cash needs (under 2 weeks) and stable payday income
Vehicle owners who need collateral-based loans and have no other credit options
People seeking check cashing services without a bank account
diagnosis: Approved Cash is best for individuals facing genuine emergencies who have access to payday income or vehicle collateral and have exhausted traditional lending options. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans are expensive short-term products (typically 100%+ APR) designed for single emergency use, not repeated borrowing—yet the company's business model depends on repeat customers. Borrowers should explore payday alternatives or credit union loans before committing to these high-cost options.
services: Payday loans (with driver's license, checking account statement, paycheck stub, personal check)
Title loans (with driver's license, vehicle title, and vehicle)
In-person loan application at physical locations
